creator: kuriyama@imgsrc.co.jp
text:
Why you removed p5-Test-Simple dependency?
 
 
 At Mon, 11 Sep 2006 08:24:27 +0800 (CST),
 Jin-Shan Tseng wrote:
 > >Description:
 > - Update to 1.14
 > 
 > Port maintainer (kuriyama@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
 > 
 > Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
 > >How-To-Repeat:
 > >Fix:
 > 
 > --- p5-Calendar-Simple-1.14.patch begins here ---
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/devel/p5-Calendar-Simple/Makefile /root/p5-Calendar-Simple/Makefile
 > --- /usr/ports/devel/p5-Calendar-Simple/Makefile	Sat Jul 23 14:57:38 2005
 > +++ /root/p5-Calendar-Simple/Makefile	Mon Sep 11 08:23:46 2006
 > @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 >  #
 >  
 >  PORTNAME=	Calendar-Simple
 > -PORTVERSION=	1.13
 > +PORTVERSION=	1.14
 >  CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 >  MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
 >  MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	Calendar
 > @@ -19,10 +19,4 @@
 >  
 >  MAN3=		Calendar::Simple.3
 >  
 > -.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 > -
 > -.if ${PERL_LEVEL} < 500800
 > -BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${SITE_PERL}/Test/More.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Simple
 > -.endif
 > -
 > -.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
 > +.include <bsd.port.mk>
 > diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/devel/p5-Calendar-Simple/distinfo /root/p5-Calendar-Simple/distinfo
 > --- /usr/ports/devel/p5-Calendar-Simple/distinfo	Sun Jan 22 16:28:43 2006
 > +++ /root/p5-Calendar-Simple/distinfo	Mon Sep 11 08:18:51 2006
 > @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 > -MD5 (Calendar-Simple-1.13.tar.gz) = 6678d917b09d516d9db23d59e9341750
 > -SHA256 (Calendar-Simple-1.13.tar.gz) = d19f396c3af286bd725c305ee4cc2a149e4a6f07879d465565e4bed3731e5380
 > -SIZE (Calendar-Simple-1.13.tar.gz) = 5605
 > +MD5 (Calendar-Simple-1.14.tar.gz) = b6a9fb7194b9657a8e3932032809fbc3
 > +SHA256 (Calendar-Simple-1.14.tar.gz) = 5ab5ee93481e3cfd4f221c8637197472919b66ce938d5df5f9c4e0f03df19e14
 > +SIZE (Calendar-Simple-1.14.tar.gz) = 5446
 > --- p5-Calendar-Simple-1.14.patch ends here ---
